children.text: that the private mortgage insurance has terminated and that the mortgagor no longer has private mortgage insurance; and
that no further premiums, payments, or other fees shall be due or payable by the mortgagor in connection with the private mortgage insurance.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If a servicer determines that a mortgage did not meet the requirements for termination or cancellation of private mortgage insurance under subsection (a) or (b) of , the servicer shall provide written notice to the mortgagor of the grounds relied on to make the determination (including the results of any appraisal used to make the determination).section 4902 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the date on which a request is received under ; orsection 4902(a)(1) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the date on which the mortgagor satisfies any evidence and certification requirements under section 4902(a)(3) of this title; and1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to termination of private mortgage insurance under , not later than 30 days after the scheduled termination date.section 4902(b) of this title
